train: Foundation Brain Migration v1 Implementation Sprint
completion_statement: Foundation Brain Migration v1 완료 — DeepSeek guarded composer, real retrieval/search, grounding, session_context memory v0, minimal enforcement, golden conversation 20/20 pass.
pipeline: query→judge(T1-T3.5)→session_context→answer_strategy→real retrieval(ssbrain bm25 ro)→grounding→DeepSeek guarded composer→F5 reverify(block→rule fallback)→enforcement→answer+trace

shashu_review.3_deepseek_location: deepseek_composer.py:compose() · key SIASIU/.secrets/deepseek_key(ro) · api.deepseek.com · deepseek-chat · composer만(guarded)
shashu_review.4_retrieval_provider: retrieval_provider.py · ssbrain.bm25(순수 파이썬)+ssbrain.sqlite(986 chunks·mode=ro) · torch/numpy 불필요 · snippets+source_trace
shashu_review.5_memory: session-only(payload in/out)·persistent write 0·SIASIU memory_fact DB 미연결·recall은 session 발화만(fabrication 0)
shashu_review.6_guardrail_enforcement: refuse 실적용(injection/internal probe)·safety_first 제품억제·recommendation_deferred 제품억제·output_verify block→rule fallback(LLM 의미 guardrail은 lexicon stub)
shashu_review.7_output_verify_rerun: YES — DeepSeek output 후 verify_output 재실행·위반→rule fallback·golden 전부 ok
shashu_review.8_production_path_modified: NO — Cosmile app/src 0·SIASIU app 0(read-only 호출만)·전부 foundation-control

t4_source_alignment.principle: 복사 아닌 승격 — Foundation decision packet=source of truth, DeepSeek=표현만
t4_source_alignment.key_promotion_diff: 샤슈는 LLM이 답 생성(decision 암묵). Foundation은 decision/products/safety/intent를 judge(T1-T3.5)가 먼저 결정·DeepSeek는 packet 표현만→불변 보장
t4_source_alignment.partial: 샤슈 LLM 재교정 1회 단계 미승격(위반시 곧장 rule fallback) — 샤슈 리뷰 항목
